query:
-- Sample of real OAuth users (not seed, not ga-import)
SELECT id, name, email, openId, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE email NOT LIKE '%@example.com' 
  AND email NOT LIKE '%@ga-import.local'
  AND name NOT REGEXP '^Guest-[0-9]{5,}$'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
